transactions.ai_insight: AI Insight: Deposits kept deliberately below the ₹50,000 PAN reporting threshold in a clustered pattern.
AI Insight: Velocity of transactions and counterparty network strongly correlate with known syndicate money-mule behaviors.
AI Insight: Account activity shows zero organic daily spend. Exclusively used as a high-volume transit node. 90% probability of shell entity.

AI Insight: Rapid successive transfers detected splitting primary amount into 3-4 unverified external accounts within 24 hours.
